expectations.text: Defines a complete map-to-battle-to-reward-to-boss vertical slice with explicit exclusions.
expectations.evidence: Defines route → battle → reward → later battle → boss → result and a dedicated 首版明确不做 section.

expectations.text: Invents a desert/mechanical second construction axis that changes decisions rather than only adding stats.
expectations.evidence: The pulse-ring pointer and placed city modules make card order and pulse value decide which module activates.

expectations.text: Separates profile state from run state and addresses save schema migration.
expectations.evidence: Defines profile/run/pending/ui/preferences and requires schemaVersion plus defaults/migration for missing ring, links, or reward arrays.

expectations.text: Includes click/target/cancel interaction contracts and multi-target behavior.
expectations.evidence: Defines enemy/self targeting, invalid target, repeat-card/blank/Escape cancellation and includes a dual-enemy encounter.

expectations.text: Includes mobile height and breakpoint tests, public deployment verification, and cache busting.
expectations.evidence: Tests 1366×768, 844×390, 780×430, 568×320 and breakpoint ±1px; verifies target commit/version/resource tags and cache identity.

expectations.text: Avoids nautical, rust, tide, and copied Slay the Spire expression.
expectations.evidence: Uses an original desert walking-city pulse-ring fantasy and explicitly prohibits copied expression.

eval_feedback.overall: Assertions are substantive and expose differences in migration, multi-target, and release discipline.
